meta.title: Football Agent Exam & Regulations Playbook | Global Management Consultancy Limited
meta.description: A multilingual professional guide for football agent exam revision and regulatory understanding, by Global Management Consultancy Limited.

hero.title: The Football Agent Exam & Regulations Playbook
hero.credibility: Written by a licensed football agent and industry advisor.
hero.subtitle: A structured knowledge resource designed to help candidates prepare for football agent exams and help practising agents refresh their understanding of the regulatory framework.

panel.title: Structured knowledge for serious candidates.
panel.text: The Playbook forms the knowledge foundation of the Agent Academy. It explains the regulatory framework behind the FIFA Football Agent Exam and helps candidates connect regulations, concepts, and practical scenarios.
panel.feature1: Clear explanations of FIFA football agent regulations
panel.feature2: Structured learning linked to exam topics
panel.feature3: Practical context for real football industry situations
panel.feature4: Direct links between regulations, explanations, and exam questions

why.title: A serious professional resource, not just another summary
why.text: Most readers do not need more raw regulation text. They need structure, clarity, memory aids, and practical context they can revisit before exams, meetings, negotiations, and compliance reviews.

1.title: Module 1 — The Football Agent Landscape
1.text: Overview of the football agency ecosystem, the role of agents and intermediaries, and the governance structure of global football.

2.title: Module 2 — Regulations Simplified
2.text: Clear explanations of the key rules and structures governing football agents.

3.title: Module 3 — Exam Revision
3.text: Study-focused summaries designed to help candidates retain and revise essential rules efficiently.

4.title: Module 4 — Practical Scenarios
4.text: Real-world examples illustrating how regulations apply in day-to-day football agency practice.

pricing.title: Access depends on your academy plan
pricing.text: The Playbook is integrated into the Agent Academy learning environment. Some sections are available as free previews, while full access is unlocked through the academy study plans.

standard.title: Free Preview
standard.text: A limited preview of the playbook to explore how the learning system works.

pro.title: Starter Access
pro.text: Unlock the first structured learning layer including key playbook sections and guided topic study.

premium.title: Professional Access
premium.text: Full playbook access integrated with quizzes, mock exams, and advanced preparation tools.

waitlist.title: Start exploring the Playbook
waitlist.text: The Playbook forms the knowledge foundation of the Agent Academy. You can begin with a limited preview or unlock the full learning system through the academy plans.
waitlist.noteText: The best learning path combines reading the playbook explanations, practising quiz questions, and testing your knowledge through mock exams.

disclaimer.title: Important notice
disclaimer.text: This publication is an independent educational resource produced under Global Management Consultancy Limited. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to FIFA.

footer.text: Independent educational resource for football industry professionals.
